changes.value:
## What
Replace `dispatchCommand` (2 calls) with `useDispatchCommand` in `kanban-app/ui/src/components/app-shell.tsx`. Also replace `useExecuteCommand` usage — `useDispatchCommand` subsumes it.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No imports of `backendDispatch`, `dispatchCommand`, or `useExecuteCommand`
- [ ] Scope chain automatic from context

## Tests
- [ ] `cd kanban-app/ui && pnpm test` — all unit tests pass

+## What
Replace `dispatchCommand` (2 calls) with `useDispatchCommand` in `kanban-app/ui/src/components/app-shell.tsx`. Also replace `useExecuteCommand` usage — `useDispatchCommand` subsumes it.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No imports of `backendDispatch`, `dispatchCommand`, or `useExecuteCommand`
- [ ] Scope chain automatic from context

## Tests
- [ ] `cd kanban-app/ui && pnpm test` — all unit tests pass

## Critical Rule
If a module-level function calls `backendDispatch`/`dispatchCommand`, do NOT preserve it. Trace it to the component that calls it. The hook goes in that component. No module-level dispatch functions should exist. See feedback_no_module_level_dispatch.md.
\ No newline at end of file
